textPlain: When they say the recommended hotspot device used for this is cheap, they really are.The recommended device for the Americas is US$11 (refurbished) on eBay with free US shipping. US$14 for shipping to Canada :(https://www.ebay.com/itm/276624956523and brand new units for US$20There’s another seller with 50 for US$160
This is such a neat and fun project! I saw these flying off the shelf at Def Con.
